# kSecCSDynamicInformation

**Global Variable**

Dynamic validity information about running code.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecCSDynamicInformation: UInt32 { get }
```

## Discussion

This information cannot be returned for code on disk (represented by a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecStaticCode] object).
title: kSecCSDynamicInformation
